pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":["Linux Mint 也采用 apt 作为包管理器，与 Ubuntu 和 Debian 类似，你需要编辑 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list"}]," 和 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/*"}]," 中的路径。对于来自 Ubuntu 与 Debian 的部分源，可以参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../ubuntu/","children":"Ubuntu 帮助"}],"与 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../debian/","children":"Debian 帮助"}],"进行修改。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["需要修改 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/official-package-repositories.list"}],"（注意备份），把 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"packages.linuxmint.com"}]," 替换为镜像源："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Linux Mint 版本","items":[["22.1 (xia)",{"release":"xia"}],["22 (wilma)",{"release":"wilma"}],["21.3 (virginia)",{"release":"virginia"}],["21.2 (victoria)",{"release":"victoria"}],["21.1 (vera)",{"release":"vera"}],["21 (vanessa)",{"release":"vanessa"}]]}],"templateId":"template-0"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["然后运行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"apt update"}]," 即可。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["注：完成后请不要再使用 mintsources（自带的图形化软件源设置工具）进行任何操作，因为在操作后，无论是否有按“确定”，mintsources 均会复写 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/official-package-repositories.list"}],"。"]}]]}]
